  "society_power": 4.8,
  "state_power": 4.5,
  "society_change": -1.2,

  "key_event": "1948 Arab-Israeli War and Palestinian Exodus",
  "reasoning": "The influx of Palestinian refugees and political crises weakened civil society, while economic growth and urbanization modestly strengthened the state."
